  • Hide All Code

Schinus_multivariate

Jorge Alonso

2026-05-18

1. Preparing

# Loading packages
library(openxlsx)
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
library(psych)
library(factoextra)
library(ggrepel)
# Cleaning memory
rm(list=ls(all=TRUE))
gc()
##           used (Mb) gc trigger  (Mb) max used (Mb)
## Ncells 1161110 62.1    2416820 129.1  1351314 72.2
## Vcells 1929743 14.8    8388608  64.0  2283311 17.5
# Database link
raw_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jmalonso55/schinus-substrate-fertilizer/refs/heads/main/stat_aroeira.csv"
# Loading data
data <- read.csv(raw_url, sep = ",")

# Checking
summary(data)
##   Treatment             Repet           Trat          Subst          Rate      
##  Length:32          Min.   :1.00   Min.   :1.00   Min.   :1.0   Min.   : 0.00  
##  Class :character   1st Qu.:1.75   1st Qu.:2.75   1st Qu.:1.0   1st Qu.: 2.25  
##  Mode  :character   Median :2.50   Median :4.50   Median :1.5   Median : 4.50  
##                     Mean   :2.50   Mean   :4.50   Mean   :1.5   Mean   : 5.25  
##                     3rd Qu.:3.25   3rd Qu.:6.25   3rd Qu.:2.0   3rd Qu.: 7.50  
##                     Max.   :4.00   Max.   :8.00   Max.   :2.0   Max.   :12.00  
##      Height         Diameter          H.D             SDM       
##  Min.   : 3.70   Min.   :0.900   Min.   :3.800   Min.   :3.030  
##  1st Qu.:32.85   1st Qu.:4.975   1st Qu.:6.350   1st Qu.:5.420  
##  Median :40.30   Median :5.150   Median :7.650   Median :5.915  
##  Mean   :35.39   Mean   :4.706   Mean   :7.166   Mean   :5.858  
##  3rd Qu.:43.88   3rd Qu.:5.425   3rd Qu.:8.125   3rd Qu.:6.812  
##  Max.   :47.20   Max.   :5.800   Max.   :8.900   Max.   :7.940  
##       RDM             S.R             DQI       
##  Min.   :2.960   Min.   :0.850   Min.   :1.000  
##  1st Qu.:4.310   1st Qu.:1.080   1st Qu.:1.100  
##  Median :4.880   Median :1.290   Median :1.250  
##  Mean   :4.774   Mean   :1.233   Mean   :1.284  
##  3rd Qu.:5.205   3rd Qu.:1.375   3rd Qu.:1.400  
##  Max.   :7.180   Max.   :1.630   Max.   :1.900
# Recoding variables
data <- data %>% mutate(Subst_alt = case_when(
    Subst == 1 ~ "SS",
    Subst == 2 ~ "CS")) %>% 
  mutate(Subst_alt = factor(Subst_alt, levels = c("SS", "CS")))

2. Correlation analysis

# Correlation matrix
mcor <- cor(data[, 6:12])

# Visualizando os valores
mcor
##              Height  Diameter        H.D       SDM        RDM        S.R
## Height    1.0000000 0.9352296  0.9450949 0.7712062  0.5435388  0.5152612
## Diameter  0.9352296 1.0000000  0.7776677 0.8066093  0.6758589  0.3998562
## H.D       0.9450949 0.7776677  1.0000000 0.6676178  0.3708383  0.5744481
## SDM       0.7712062 0.8066093  0.6676178 1.0000000  0.7253770  0.5650871
## RDM       0.5435388 0.6758589  0.3708383 0.7253770  1.0000000 -0.1498697
## S.R       0.5152612 0.3998562  0.5744481 0.5650871 -0.1498697  1.0000000
## DQI      -0.1316742 0.1382121 -0.3526224 0.3674351  0.6827732 -0.3386598
##                 DQI
## Height   -0.1316742
## Diameter  0.1382121
## H.D      -0.3526224
## SDM       0.3674351
## RDM       0.6827732
## S.R      -0.3386598
## DQI       1.0000000
# Coefficient significance
test_cor <- cor.mtest(data[, 6:12])

# Visualizing p_value
round(test_cor$p, 4)
##          Height Diameter    H.D    SDM    RDM    S.R    DQI
## Height   0.0000   0.0000 0.0000 0.0000 0.0013 0.0025 0.4725
## Diameter 0.0000   0.0000 0.0000 0.0000 0.0000 0.0234 0.4506
## H.D      0.0000   0.0000 0.0000 0.0000 0.0367 0.0006 0.0478
## SDM      0.0000   0.0000 0.0000 0.0000 0.0000 0.0008 0.0386
## RDM      0.0013   0.0000 0.0367 0.0000 0.0000 0.4130 0.0000
## S.R      0.0025   0.0234 0.0006 0.0008 0.4130 0.0000 0.0580
## DQI      0.4725   0.4506 0.0478 0.0386 0.0000 0.0580 0.0000
# Color pallete
col <- colorRampPalette(c("#BB4444", "#EE9988", "#FFFFFF", "#77AADD", "#4477AA"))

# Plotting
corrplot(mcor, method="color", col=col(200), type="upper", order="hclust", number.cex = 0.5, number.font = 1, addCoef.col = "black", tl.cex = 0.5, tl.col="black", tl.srt=0, tl.offset = 1, p.mat = test_cor$p, sig.level = 0.06, insig = "blank", diag=FALSE)

3. Principal components analysis

# Checking factor adequacy
KMO(data[, 6:12])
## Kaiser-Meyer-Olkin factor adequacy
## Call: KMO(r = data[, 6:12])
## Overall MSA =  0.58
## MSA for each item = 
##   Height Diameter      H.D      SDM      RDM      S.R      DQI 
##     0.67     0.66     0.63     0.61     0.48     0.38     0.58
# Running PCA
pcadata <- prcomp(data[, 6:12], scale = T)

# Resume
summary(pcadata)
## Importance of components:
##                           PC1    PC2     PC3     PC4    PC5     PC6     PC7
## Standard deviation     2.0452 1.4093 0.81679 0.38392 0.1057 0.05815 0.04584
## Proportion of Variance 0.5975 0.2837 0.09531 0.02106 0.0016 0.00048 0.00030
## Cumulative Proportion  0.5975 0.8813 0.97656 0.99762 0.9992 0.99970 1.00000
# PCA loadings
round(pcadata$rotation, 2)
##            PC1   PC2   PC3   PC4   PC5   PC6   PC7
## Height   -0.47 -0.12 -0.25  0.15  0.16 -0.79  0.16
## Diameter -0.46  0.06 -0.17  0.75 -0.13  0.40 -0.12
## H.D      -0.43 -0.27 -0.28 -0.45  0.53  0.37 -0.20
## SDM      -0.45  0.15  0.39 -0.30 -0.45 -0.14 -0.56
## RDM      -0.33  0.51 -0.20 -0.33 -0.29  0.18  0.61
## S.R      -0.27 -0.42  0.71  0.05  0.09  0.12  0.47
## DQI      -0.05  0.67  0.36  0.13  0.62 -0.06 -0.09
# Basic biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(pcadata, repel = TRUE, geom.ind = "point", pointsize = 1.2)

# Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(pcadata, col.ind = data$Subst_alt, repel = TRUE, palette = c("#FF9999","#0099FF"), mean.point = FALSE, geom.ind = "point", pointsize = 2.5, col.var = "#708090", title = "", legend.title = "Substrate:") +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = data$Rate, color = data$Subst_alt),  inherit.aes = TRUE, show.legend=FALSE)+
  theme(text = element_text(size=12,  family="serif"), 
        legend.position="bottom")

4. Cluster analysis

4.1. Kmeans

# Selecting the number of clusters
fviz_nbclust(data[,6:12], kmeans, method = "wss") +
  xlab("Number of k cluster") +
  ylab("Within-cluster sum of squares")

# Kmeans cluster analysis
df <- scale(data[,6:12])
set.seed(123)
km.res <- kmeans(df, 3, nstart = 25)

# Results
km.res
## K-means clustering with 3 clusters of sizes 8, 4, 20
## 
## Cluster means:
##        Height   Diameter        H.D        SDM        RDM        S.R        DQI
## 1  0.03049566  0.4050291 -0.3087458  0.3864175  1.2001928 -0.8681627  1.3012640
## 2 -2.41395994 -2.5623420 -2.0717908 -2.1560762 -1.7603041 -1.1118575 -0.3622075
## 3  0.47059372  0.3504568  0.5378565  0.2766482 -0.1280163  0.5696366 -0.4480641
## 
## Clustering vector:
##  [1] 3 3 1 3 3 3 3 3 3 1 3 1 3 1 3 1 2 2 2 2 1 1 3 1 3 3 3 3 3 3 3 3
## 
## Within cluster sum of squares by cluster:
## [1] 23.296381  0.624574 30.468176
##  (between_SS / total_SS =  74.9 %)
## 
## Available components:
## 
## [1] "cluster"      "centers"      "totss"        "withinss"     "tot.withinss"
## [6] "betweenss"    "size"         "iter"         "ifault"
# Results in the right scale
cluster <- cbind(data[,6:12], cluster = km.res$cluster)
aggregate(cluster, by=list(cluster=cluster$cluster), mean)
##   cluster  Height Diameter    H.D     SDM     RDM    S.R    DQI cluster
## 1       1 35.7875     5.30 6.7125 6.34625 5.95125 1.0725 1.5875       1
## 2       2  3.9750     0.95 4.1250 3.13250 3.04750 1.0275 1.2000       2
## 3       3 41.5150     5.22 7.9550 6.20750 4.64850 1.3380 1.1800       3
# Basic cluster plot
fviz_cluster(km.res, data = df, main ="", repel=TRUE)

# Cluster + PCA
fviz_pca_biplot(pcadata, habillage = as.factor(km.res$cluster), repel = TRUE, addEllipses = TRUE, ellipse.type = "convex", col.var = "#708090", geom.ind = "point", legend = "bottom", legend.title = "Clusters:", title = "", palette = "Dark2", pointsize = 3, mean.point = FALSE) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14,  family = "serif"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

4.2. Hierarchical

# Adding labels
rownames(df) <- interaction(data$Subst_alt, data$Rate)
# Euclidean distance
dist_hc <- dist(df, method = "euclidean")
# Hierarchical cluster
hc_ward <- hclust(dist_hc, method = "ward.D2")
# Dendrogram
fviz_dend(hc_ward, k = 3, rect = TRUE, show_labels = TRUE, palette = "Dark2", main = "") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14, family = "serif"))

4.3. Variables cluster

# Euclidean distance
dist_cor <- dist(mcor, method = "euclidean")
# Cluster
hc = hclust(dist_cor, method = "ward.D")
hc$labels<-c("Height", "Diameter", "H/D", "SDM", "RDM", "S/R", "DQI")
# Plotting
fviz_dend(hc, cex = 1.3, k = 3, color_labels_by_k = TRUE, repel = TRUE, main = "",  type = "phylogenic", ylab = "", palette = "Dark2", ggtheme = theme_classic())
